name: C4RBN
description: 4HP 4/2-pole state-variable filter with input saturation and output wavefolder. Simultaneous LP/BP/HP 2-pole outputs plus a switchable-mode 4-pole output. Includes PING envelope for vactrol-style pluck.

controls.name: RES
controls.description: Filter resonance. Self-oscillates past 3 o'clock, generating a clean sine.

controls.name: FM
controls.description: Inverting attenuator for the FM input. Scales cutoff CV bidirectionally.
controls.detail: CCW: invert · noon: zero · CW: unity · exponential response

controls.name: FOLD/SAT Button
controls.description: Press toggles the 4P output wavefolder (FOLD LED). Hold cycles 4 input saturation levels (SAT LED).
controls.detail: Saturation: 4 stepped levels · wavefolder post-4P core

controls.name: HP/BP/LP Button
controls.description: Cycles 4-pole filter mode between HP, BP, LP. LED updates immediately; audio switches on release when held.

inputs.name: IN
inputs.description: Audio input. Passes through the input saturator before hitting the first 2-pole core.

inputs.name: V/OCT
inputs.description: Calibrated exponential CV input for keytracked cutoff.

inputs.name: FM
inputs.description: Exponential cutoff CV input, scaled by the FM attenuverter.

inputs.name: RES
inputs.description: CV for resonance. Sums with the RES knob.

inputs.name: SAT
inputs.description: CV for input saturation amount. Adds to the stepped SAT setting.

inputs.name: PING
inputs.description: Gate/trigger input. Fires a fast-decay vactrol-style envelope into cutoff.

outputs.name: LP
outputs.description: 2-pole low-pass output of the first filter core.

outputs.name: BP
outputs.description: 2-pole band-pass output of the first filter core.

outputs.name: HP
outputs.description: 2-pole high-pass output of the first filter core.

outputs.name: 4P
outputs.description: Series 2nd 2-pole filter output. Mode selected via HP/BP/LP button; optional wavefolder post-filter.

behaviors.name: Simultaneous 2-pole outputs
behaviors.description: The first 2-pole core outputs LP, BP, and HP simultaneously — pick multiple responses for sum-and-difference or stereo-spread patches without retracking cutoff.

behaviors.name: Series 4-pole path
behaviors.description: The 4P jack is the output of a second 2-pole stage fed in series from the first, yielding a steeper 4-pole response. Its mode (HP/BP/LP) is independent from the 2-pole outputs.

behaviors.name: Vactrol-style ping
behaviors.description: PING injects a fast-decay exponential envelope directly into cutoff, emulating a Low Pass Gate. With resonance near self-oscillation, yields plucky pitched tones without a patched envelope.

behaviors.name: Self-oscillating sine VCO
behaviors.trigger: RES past 3 o'clock with no audio at IN
behaviors.description: Filter self-oscillates as a clean sine. V/OCT input tracks over useful range — turns C4RBN into a sine VCO for pinged bass or FM carriers.

behaviors.name: Staged input saturation
behaviors.description: Four discrete saturation levels at the filter input — from clean (level 0) to aggressive drive. SAT CV input adds continuous modulation on top of the chosen step.

behaviors.name: Output wavefolder
behaviors.description: Folds the 4P output post-filter. With high resonance or self-oscillation, adds screaming harmonics reminiscent of the Synchrodyne. Only affects 4P — 2-pole jacks stay clean.

behaviors.name: Delayed 4P mode switch
behaviors.description: LED reflects selection immediately, but the audio mode only changes when the button is released — useful to line up a filter-mode change on the beat during live performance.

patchIdeas.name: Pinged vactrol bass
patchIdeas.patch: RES near self-osc · close FREQ low · no IN signal · clock-derived trigger to PING · take 4P (LP mode) · results in plucky pitched bass tones with natural decay
patchIdeas.diagram:
C4RBN:
* RES: ~3 o'clock
* FREQ: low
* 4P mode: LP

Clock:

- Clock (Out) t> C4RBN (PING)
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> C4RBN (V/OCT)
- C4RBN (4P) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Screaming fold lead
patchIdeas.patch: audio through IN · SAT cycled to stage 3 · FOLD enabled · RES high · envelope to FM via attenuverter · take 4P for overdriven folded lead
patchIdeas.diagram:
C4RBN:
* SAT: stage 3
* FOLD: on
* RES: high
* 4P mode: BP

VCO:
Envelope:

- VCO (Saw) -> C4RBN (IN)
- Envelope (Out) >> C4RBN (FM)
- C4RBN (4P) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Parallel LP/HP notch
patchIdeas.patch: mix LP and HP 2-pole outputs to external mixer with HP inverted · pseudo-notch with resonance peak at cutoff · FM attenuverter sweeps with bipolar LFO
patchIdeas.diagram:
C4RBN:

VCO:
LFO:
Mixer:

- VCO (Out) -> C4RBN (IN)
- LFO (Out) >> C4RBN (FM)
- C4RBN (LP) -> Mixer (In 1)
- C4RBN (HP) -> Mixer (In 2) // invert at mixer
- Mixer (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Sine VCO for FM
patchIdeas.patch: RES fully past self-osc · IN unpatched · V/OCT from sequencer · BP output as sine carrier · feed second VCO into FM input for filter-FM
patchIdeas.diagram:
C4RBN:
* RES: self-osc
* FREQ: mid

VCO:
Sequencer:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> C4RBN (V/OCT)
- VCO (Out) >> C4RBN (FM) // audio-rate FM
- C4RBN (BP) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Synchrodyne fold bass
patchIdeas.patch: 4P mode LP · FOLD on · RES moderate · slow envelope to FREQ via FM · SAT stage 2 on input · fat folded bass with harmonic bite as filter opens
patchIdeas.diagram:
C4RBN:
* 4P mode: LP
* FOLD: on
* SAT: stage 2
* RES: noon

VCO:
Envelope:

- VCO (Sub) -> C4RBN (IN)
- Envelope (Out) >> C4RBN (FM)
- C4RBN (4P) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Stereo 2-pole spread
patchIdeas.patch: LP out hard-left · HP out hard-right · shared modulation to FM · creates phantom center with cutoff-dependent stereo width
patchIdeas.diagram:
C4RBN:

VCO:
LFO:
Mixer:

- VCO (Out) -> C4RBN (IN)
- LFO (Out) >> C4RBN (FM)
- C4RBN (LP) -> Mixer (L)
- C4RBN (HP) -> Mixer (R)
